Prediction: Yes

The current visit record explicitly mentions "Pure hypercholesterolemia" as one of the diagnoses. This indicates that the patient has a diagnosed lipid disorder, which is a clear and strong evidence of a disorder of lipid metabolism. Given that this condition is already diagnosed, it is likely that it will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit, especially if there is ongoing management or monitoring of this condition. Therefore, based on the presence of this specific diagnosis, the prediction is that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be present as a diagnosis in the next visit.
